duplicate_ingredient_paracetamol: Dr. Mehta prescribed Crocin and Dr. Rao prescribed Dolo — both contain paracetamol. Do I need both of these?

same_drug_class_beta_blocker: Dr. Mehta prescribed Atenolol and Dr. Rao prescribed Metoprolol — both are beta-blockers. Do I need both?

Should I ask one of my doctors to coordinate with the other about which beta-blocker is right for me?
duplicate_ingredient_metformin: Both prescriptions contain metformin (Glycomet and another). Is this meant to be a combined dose?
